knowledge_bus/compiled/estate_index_v1.yaml:20-28 — all six unresolved subsystems listed under wave1_subsystems_legacy_hard_coded. As subsystems are promoted to compiled evidence, they must be moved from wave1_subsystems_legacy_hard_coded to card_evidence_artefacts. Any subsystem remaining legacy must stay in the list with updated launch_classification. The estate index is the authoritative ledger; it must reflect the actual estate state after the sprint.

backend/core/knowledge/health_system_card_evidence.py:244-267 — load_card_evidence_artefact() loads by filename convention knowledge_bus/compiled/health_system_cards/{subsystem_id}.yaml. get_card_evidence_artefact() enforces PILOT_COMPILED_SUBSYSTEM_IDS membership guard. assemble_subsystem_from_compiled_card_evidence() at line 301 is already generic — works for any subsystem_id, not pilot-specific. To extend to new subsystems: (1) create YAML artefacts, (2) expand PILOT_COMPILED_SUBSYSTEM_IDS, (3) add to estate index. No structural loader changes required. PILOT_SUBSYSTEM_ID constant (line 25) is used only in the PILOT_COMPILED_SUBSYSTEM_IDS initialisation and should remain or be generalised — either is safe.

knowledge_bus/schema/health_system_card_evidence_schema_v1.yaml:3 — status: 'DRAFT'. The prompt does not require schema status promotion. DRAFT status is acceptable for continued pilot manual compilation. Schema already defines all required field types, enums, and validation rules adequate for all six subsystems. No schema change required for this sprint.

automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:229-264 — scope items 1-10 define allowed surface: compiled artefact generation, manifests, estate index, schema extension only if backward-compatible, loader/assembler extension for multi-subsystem, legacy path preservation for retained subsystems, DTO/frontend only if required for existing design, audit and provenance reports, regression tests. Out-of-scope list (lines 340-359) prohibits root-cause, hypothesis, PSI, SignalRegistry, SignalEvaluator, full package backfill, investigation spec modification, SSOT, scoring, thresholds, helper scripts.

automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:363-376 — 12 test categories: schema validation per artefact, manifest resolution per artefact, estate index covering all Wave 1 subsystems, loader success per promoted artefact, loader fail-closed, assembler test for compiled path, assembler test for retained legacy path, bilirubin regression, DTO serialisation if touched, frontend render-only if touched, source_trace not consumer-rendered, no marker role inference from name. Adequate coverage of all behaviour change surfaces.

Primary risk: PILOT_COMPILED_SUBSYSTEM_IDS expansion changes which subsystems emit SubsystemEvidenceV1 from compiled artefact vs. hard-coded path. For retained subsystems, hard-coded _Wave1SubsystemDef entries (wave1_subsystem_evidence.py:31-83) remain unchanged — their output is deterministic as before. For promoted subsystems, compiled artefact content becomes the deterministic authority. Internal checkpoint (draft artefact validation before expansion) is the determinism gate. No IntelligenceGraph, no scoring, no PSI, no root-cause involved.

automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:381-395 — 12 STOP conditions covering: missing authority files (#1), subsystem classification failure (#2), artefact validation failure (#3), manifest ref unresolvable (#4), provenance unclassifiable (#5), PSI required (#6), root-cause text required (#7), raw investigation spec runtime reads (#8), frontend medical inference (#9), bilirubin reintroduction (#10), scope creep into forbidden areas (#11), compiled/legacy separation unprovable (#12). Adequate.

backend/core/knowledge/health_system_card_evidence.py:26 — PILOT_COMPILED_SUBSYSTEM_IDS is the sole routing gate. For every subsystem to be promoted to compiled evidence, its subsystem_id must be added to this frozenset. This change must happen AFTER the internal checkpoint confirms all promoted artefacts validate against schema. It must NOT happen before checkpoint. If any artefact fails validation, the corresponding subsystem_id must NOT be added to the set until the artefact is corrected.

No investigation spec exists for: total_cholesterol and tc_hdl_ratio (wave1_cv_lipid_transport); insulin (wave1_met_insulin_metabolic); ast (wave1_liv_enzyme_pattern); bilirubin (wave1_liv_processing_context). For each compiled card artefact that includes these markers: (1) source_spec_ids must NOT claim explicit provenance for these markers, (2) provenance.source_spec_provenance must be set to 'inferred_from_package_manifest', (3) provenance.notes must explicitly state which markers have inferred vs. spec-backed provenance. Do not treat inferred provenance as explicit. Prompt requirement confirmed at lines 286-299.

knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_lipid_transport/package_manifest.yaml — NO source_document field, classified provenance_gap in M1 audit. Must NOT appear in package_refs or be used as source authority for wave1_cv_lipid_transport card artefact. Valid provenance sources for that artefact are: pkg_s24_ldl_high_dyslipidaemia (source: inv_ldl_high_dyslipidaemia_v1.yaml), pkg_s24_hdl_high_cardiovascular (source: inv_hdl_high_cardiovascular.yaml), pkg_s24_hdl_low_cardiovascular (source: inv_hdl_low_cardiovascular.yaml), pkg_s24_triglycerides_high_metabolic (source: inv_triglycerides_high_metabolic_v1.yaml). total_cholesterol and tc_hdl_ratio have no backing spec — declare them as inferred.

automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:340-359 — non-goals explicitly prohibit: hypothesis/root-cause runtime promotion or modification, SignalRegistry modification, SignalEvaluator modification, PSI runtime wiring, full 186-package provenance backfill, investigation spec modification, package file modification (unless hardening explicitly approves narrow manifest-only change), biomarker SSOT modification, scoring rails, clinical thresholds, unit conversion, fallback parsers, consumer-visible source trace, helper scripts.

Each compiled card artefact covers one subsystem only (artefact requirement, prompt line 271). PILOT_COMPILED_SUBSYSTEM_IDS frozenset ensures one compiled path per subsystem_id — no duplicate routing. Legacy hard-coded path at wave1_subsystem_evidence.py:168-185 only runs for subsystems NOT in the compiled set — no dual-authority conflict. Estate index is the authoritative ledger of which path each subsystem uses.
